sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62474" key="leptakino/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεπτ-ᾰκῐνός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, poet. for sq., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.102</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammian.</author> </bibl> or <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicarch.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
